body.title: Binding — coalition detection on hot node set
body.result: Phase 1 binding implemented: coalition.py with detect_coalitions() — BFS clustering of hot nodes connected via interpretive_edges; NE calls it after each cycle using TWM obs memory_ids as spreading activation seeds; logs COALITION|size=N|weight=X|centroid=Y to ring(ne_diagnostic). Syntax OK, guards tested.
body.description: After spreading activation + inhibition run, detect which hot nodes are co-activating coherently. A coalition = cluster of mutually reinforcing nodes whose combined activation exceeds a threshold. That coalition IS the percept — what Igor is 'about' right now. Implementation: post-spreading-activation clustering pass on heat field; output = list of coalitions with aggregate weight; top coalition feeds into NE frame selection and habit scoring. Deferred until graph is dense enough for meaningful coalitions. Prereqs: T-spreading-activation, T-inhibition-propagation, T-graph-integrator.
